baseline.prompt: Download the PDF page at {input}, read it, rebuild it as a single HTML <table>, and return only the HTML.

terse-prompt.prompt: Parse the PDF at {input} into HTML and output the HTML only.

step-by-step.prompt: Download the PDF page at {input}, read it, rebuild it as a single HTML <table>, then re-read the original and verify your table matches before returning. Output only the HTML.

few-shot.system_prompt:
Example: a 2-row, 3-column 'Revenue by region' table becomes ...
RegionQ1Q2
.
few-shot.prompt: Parse the PDF page at {input} into a single HTML <table>. Output only the HTML.
